acceptance_criteria.description: npm run build exits 0 with zero TypeScript errors
acceptance_criteria.evidence: build: 8 routes compiled in 5.5s, 0 TypeScript errors, 0 lint errors

acceptance_criteria.description: node tools/validate-contracts.mjs exits 0 — chainless + public-safe scan PASS
acceptance_criteria.evidence: OK — all contracts valid (0 warning(s)) — 9 checks passed including nft-chainless.json and public-safe-assets.json

acceptance_criteria.description: Impeccable critique ≥ 7/10, 0 P0 findings on collector-facing surface
acceptance_criteria.evidence: QA stage eval: 8.5/10 combined (34+34/80), 0 P0 findings, 1 P1 fixed (muted contrast → 4.92:1). See proof/qa-eval-result.json

acceptance_criteria.description: Hero copy is exactly 'Own the edition. Skip the wallet.' (baseline lock)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: app/page.tsx h1: 'Own the edition. Skip the wallet.' — browser read_page confirmed ref_12

acceptance_criteria.description: Primary CTA is 'Add to collection' (baseline lock)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: components/AddToCollectionButton.tsx button text 'Add to collection'; CheckoutPanel.tsx submit button 'Add to collection'; confirmed via browser read_page ref_68 and ref_85

acceptance_criteria.description: Footer nonclaim present on every page
acceptance_criteria.evidence: FooterNonclaim renders in PageFooter on every route; browser confirmed ref_58 on /, /editions/plum-moon, /checkout/plum-moon, /collection

acceptance_criteria.description: First-purchase notice fires before first Add to collection
acceptance_criteria.evidence: FirstPurchaseNotice dialog appeared (ref_69 'A quick note before your first edition') on first click of Add to collection; confirmed correct copy 'A quick note: this is a synthetic collectible...'

acceptance_criteria.description: Negative code proof: no non-allowlisted forbidden term matches in app source
acceptance_criteria.evidence: validate-contracts.mjs passes (includes nft-chainless scan); no ethers/viem/wagmi/metamask/web3/blockchain/mintNFT/mintToken in any source file

acceptance_criteria.description: Negative dep proof: no wallet/chain/crypto package in package.json
acceptance_criteria.evidence: package.json deps: next, react, react-dom only. devDeps: @types/*, autoprefixer, postcss, tailwindcss, typescript only. Zero chain deps.

acceptance_criteria.description: Local ownership fixture stores to localStorage, never calls any chain RPC
acceptance_criteria.evidence: lib/collection.tsx uses window.localStorage.setItem only; no fetch/XMLHttpRequest/WebSocket/RPC calls; ownership is client-local state only

acceptance_criteria.description: All 8 pages render without console errors
acceptance_criteria.evidence: read_console_messages(onlyErrors=true) returned 0 errors across /, /editions/[id], /checkout/[id], /collection flows; build compiled all 8 routes clean

acceptance_criteria.description: Collect → shelf flow clickable end to end
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Browser verified: / → /editions/plum-moon (Add to collection) → FirstPurchaseNotice → /checkout/plum-moon → 'It's yours. Added to your Vitrine.' → /collection 'Your Vitrine' showing 'Plum Moon no. 7 of 50'

score.note: All 12 ACs pass. AC3 evaluated in qa stage: 8.5/10, 0 P0.
